raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "cup",
    "Action concept": "Push",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "frontally",
    "Precondition": "The cup is directly in front of box_2 and reachable by the right arm. The area in front of the cup toward the table edge is clear so the cup can slide forward without colliding with other objects.",
    "Postcondition": "The cup is shifted ~10 cm toward the front edge of the table, leaving the space in front of both boxes unobstructed."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Push",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The right arm can reach the left face of box_2. There is at least 15 cm of free tabletop surface to the right of box_2 so it can be pushed without falling off the table or colliding with other objects.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_2 is displaced ~15 cm to the right, creating a clear gap between box_1 and box_2 large enough for the robot’s right end-effector to contact the right face of box_1."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "A gap exists on both sides of box_1 after moving box_2. Both arms can approach the left and right faces of box_1 without obstruction, and the tabletop space above the box is clear for a vertical lift.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_1 is securely held between the two end-effectors and lifted a few centimeters above the tabletop, completing the pick-up task."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The cup is directly in front of box_2 and reachable by the right arm. The area in front of the cup toward the table edge is clear so the cup can slide forward without colliding with other objects.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The cup is shifted ~10 cm toward the front edge of the table, leaving the space in front of both boxes unobstructed.

parsed_json.Precondition: The right arm can reach the left face of box_2. There is at least 15 cm of free tabletop surface to the right of box_2 so it can be pushed without falling off the table or colliding with other objects.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_2 is displaced ~15 cm to the right, creating a clear gap between box_1 and box_2 large enough for the robot’s right end-effector to contact the right face of box_1.

parsed_json.Precondition: A gap exists on both sides of box_1 after moving box_2. Both arms can approach the left and right faces of box_1 without obstruction, and the tabletop space above the box is clear for a vertical lift.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_1 is securely held between the two end-effectors and lifted a few centimeters above the tabletop, completing the pick-up task.
